author: selfish
description: Manage tasks with drag-and-drop planning, Today focus, backlog, overdue tracking, and weekly time horizons. - This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff.

manifest.author: Selfish
manifest.description: Manage tasks with drag-and-drop planning, Today focus, backlog, overdue tracking, and weekly time horizons.
manifest.name: Task Planner

name: Task Planner

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fix: obsidian lint  by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/28
* Pre release touchups by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/29
* feat: move fuzzy control to settings by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/30
* feat: migrate checkboxes in header to LED style buttons by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/31
* feat: add Today Focus and Future Focus view modes by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/32
* Feat/parse hashtags by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/34
* Feat/custom horizon colors by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/35
* Fix/at attribute parsing by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/36
* Code cleanup by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/37
* Feat/quick add tasks by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/41
* Feat/proper render by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/42
* chore(deps): bump obsidian from 1.8.7 to 1.11.4 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/39
* chore(deps): bump @types/node from 25.0.8 to 25.0.9 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/38
* Feat/quick add convenience by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/43
* feat: switch to preact for a smaller bundle size by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/44
* feat: follow up task by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/45
* feat: mobile readiness by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/46
* Feat/enhance right sidebar view by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/47
* test: enhance coverage by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/48
* Mutiple general enhancements by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/49
* feat: header actions and overdue reschedule by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/50
* Horizons ux by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/51
* feat: better subtasks by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/52
* Right click menu by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/53
* fix: serach was off, both fuzzy and regular by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/54
* feat: undo toast after moving tasks by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/55
* fix: horizon duplication of tasks by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/56
* Terminology T1 + Theme Variables by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/57
* Ignore Tasks and Notes from Planning View by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/58
* refactor: terminology: task by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/67
* feat: improve In-progress column UX by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/69
* feat: improve Follow-up and Reschedule menu UX by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/68
* chore(deps): bump the typescript-eslint group with 2 updates by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/59
* chore(deps): bump @testing-library/react from 16.3.1 to 16.3.2 in the testing group by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/60
* chore(deps): bump @types/react from 19.2.8 to 19.2.9 in the react group by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/61
* chore(deps): bump prettier from 3.8.0 to 3.8.1 in the linting group by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/62
* chore(deps): bump @preact/compat from 17.1.2 to 18.3.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/64
* chore(deps): bump globals from 17.0.0 to 17.1.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/65
* chore(deps): bump @types/node from 25.0.9 to 25.0.10 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/63
* chore(deps): bump sass from 1.97.2 to 1.97.3 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/66
* Horizon names by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/86
* ci(deps): bump actions/upload-artifact from 6 to 7 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/85
* chore(deps): bump the react group across 1 directory with 2 updates by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/90
* chore(deps): bump the linting group across 1 directory with 3 updates by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/91
* chore(deps): bump the typescript-eslint group with 2 updates by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/70
* chore(deps): bump preact from 10.28.2 to 10.28.3 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/72
* chore(deps): bump globals from 17.1.0 to 17.3.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/75
* chore(deps): bump @commitlint/config-conventional from 20.3.1 to 20.4.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/78
* chore(deps): bump @commitlint/cli from 20.3.1 to 20.4.1 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/79
* chore(deps): bump esbuild from 0.27.2 to 0.27.3 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/81
* chore(deps): bump obsidian from 1.11.4 to 1.12.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/83
* chore(deps): bump @types/node from 25.1.0 to 25.2.3 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/84
* ci(deps): bump codecov/codecov-action from 5 to 6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/87
* ci(deps): bump softprops/action-gh-release from 2 to 3 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/88


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/compare/1.5.0...2.0.0

releases.description:
## What's Changed
* Fix/obsidian plugin guidelines by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/19
* ci(deps): bump actions/upload-artifact from 4 to 6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/1
* ci(deps): bump actions/checkout from 4 to 6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/4
* ci(deps): bump actions/setup-node from 4 to 6 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/3
* chore(deps): bump builtin-modules from 3.3.0 to 5.0.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/14
* chore(deps): bump esbuild from 0.25.0 to 0.27.2 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/13
* chore(deps): bump @types/node from 20.19.29 to 25.0.8 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/12
* chore(deps): bump jest-environment-jsdom from 29.7.0 to 30.2.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/11
* chore(deps): bump the testing group with 3 updates by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/7
* chore(deps): bump the react group with 5 updates by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/8
* chore(deps): bump luxon from 2.5.2 to 3.7.2 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/10
* chore(deps): bump chrono-node from 2.3.8 to 2.9.0 by @dependabot[bot] in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/15
* Replace luxon with Obsidian's built-in moment by @selfish in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/21

## New Contributors
* @dependabot[bot] made their first contribution in https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/pull/1

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/selfish/obsidian-task-planner/compare/1.0.4...1.1.0
